A

Ability - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the abstract Ability class
Ability(String, String) - Constructor for class Ability
Constructor for the abstract Ability class
activateAbility(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Ability
Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, activates the weapon's ability
activateAbility(Entity, Entity) - Method in class BattleAxe_Ability
Concrete implementation of abstract method activateAbility
activateAbility(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Dagger_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method activateAbility
activateAbility(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Fists_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method activateAbility
activateAbility(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Greatsword_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method activateAbility
activateAbility(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Katana_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method activateAbility
activateAbility(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Sword_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method activateAbility
activateSkill(Entity, Entity) - Method in class AdrenalineRush_Skill
Concrete implementation of the activateSkill method This method only becomes available to use when the skill's condition has been met
activateSkill(Entity, Entity) - Method in class DreamSlash_Skill
Concrete implementation of the activateSkill method This method only becomes available to use when the skill's condition has been met
activateSkill(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Omnislash_Skill
Concrete implementation of the activateSkill method This method only becomes available to use when the skill's condition has been met
activateSkill(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Parry_Skill
Concrete implementation of the activateSkill method This method only becomes available to use when the skill's condition has been met
activateSkill(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Skill
Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, activates the skill Skill activation can happen any amount of turns after it has been made available to use
addArmor(Armor) - Method in class SelectionController
Setter method to add an armor object to the corresponding ArrayList
addConsumable(Consumable) - Method in class SelectionController
Setter method to add a consumable object to the corresponding ArrayList
addEnemy(Enemy) - Method in class SelectionController
Setter method to add an enemy object to the corresponding ArrayList
addEnvironment(Environment) - Method in class SelectionController
Setter method to add an environment object to the corresponding ArrayList
addWeapon(Weapon) - Method in class SelectionController
Setter method to add a weapon object to the corresponding ArrayList
AdrenalineRush_Skill - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the AdrenalineRush_Skill class, this is a subclass of the abstract SKill class
AdrenalineRush_Skill(double, int, int) - Constructor for class AdrenalineRush_Skill
Constructor for the Adrenaline Rush skill
affectEnemy(Enemy) - Method in class Environment
Affects the chosen enemy stat
affectPlayer(Player) - Method in class Environment
Affects the chosen player stat

Class file for the Armor class.
Armor(String, String, int, int) - Constructor for class Armor

attack(Entity) - Method in class Entity
Method for attacking the target

Constructor for the BattleAxe_Ability class

Class file for the Bomb class, this is a subclass of the abstract Consumable class
Bomb(String, int, String[], int[], String[], int[], int) - Constructor for class Bomb

Buff - Class in Unnamed Package

Buff(String, int, String[], int[], int) - Constructor for class Buff

C

Entity - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the abstract Entity class
Entity(String, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class Entity
Constructor for the entity class
charge() - Method in class Entity
Method for setting the Entity's charging state to true
checkAbilityCondition(Entity) - Method in class Ability
Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, checks if the weapon's ability conditions have been met
checkAbilityCondition(Entity) - Method in class BattleAxe_Ability
Concrete implementation of abstract method checkAbilityCondition
checkAbilityCondition(Entity) - Method in class Dagger_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method checkAbilityCondition
checkAbilityCondition(Entity) - Method in class Fists_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method checkAbilityCondition
checkAbilityCondition(Entity) - Method in class Greatsword_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method checkAbilityCondition
checkAbilityCondition(Entity) - Method in class Katana_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method checkAbilityCondition
checkAbilityCondition(Entity) - Method in class Sword_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method checkAbilityCondition
checkSkillConditionCounter(Entity, Entity) - Method in class AdrenalineRush_Skill
Concrete implementation of the checkSkillConditionCounter method The skill activates when a user chooses to attack x amount of times continuously The counter is reset when they choose to do another action besides attacking e.g.
checkSkillConditionCounter(Entity, Entity) - Method in class DreamSlash_Skill
Concrete implementation of the checkSkillConditionCounter method The skill activates when a user has dealt an x amount of total damage to the enemy
checkSkillConditionCounter(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Omnislash_Skill
Concrete implementation of the checkSkillConditionCounter method The skill activates when an x amount of turns have passed since either the start of the battle or the last time the skill has been used
checkSkillConditionCounter(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Parry_Skill
Concrete implementation of the checkSkillConditionCounter method The skill activates when a weapon's passive has activated an x amount of times since either the start of the battle or the last time the skill has been used
checkSkillConditionCounter(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Skill
Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, checks if the skill's activation condition/s have been met
CLIViewer - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file that handles rudimentary displaying of information in the command line.
CLIViewer() - Constructor for class CLIViewer
 
Consumable - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the abstract Consumable class.
Consumable(String, String, int, boolean, boolean, String[], int[], int) - Constructor for class Consumable
Constructor for consumables that affect either the player or enemy
Consumable(String, String, int, String[], int[], String[], int[], int) - Constructor for class Consumable
Constructor for consumables that affect either the player or enemy
consume(Entity) - Method in class Entity
Method for using the entity's equipped consumable
countAffectingTurns(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Consumable
Method to keep track of the amount of turns the consumable has remained active, once it reaches the same value as affectingTurns, it restores the stat effects
createActiveSkillResultDescription(Entity, Entity) - Method in class AdrenalineRush_Skill
Concrete implementation of the createActiveSkillResult Description method Generates the text to be displayed when the user activates the skill
createActiveSkillResultDescription(Entity, Entity) - Method in class DreamSlash_Skill
Concrete implementation of the createActiveSkillResult Description method Generates the text to be displayed when the user activates the skill
createActiveSkillResultDescription(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Omnislash_Skill
Concrete implementation of the createActiveSkillResult Description method Generates the text to be displayed when the user activates the skill
createActiveSkillResultDescription(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Parry_Skill
Concrete implementation of the createActiveSkillResult Description method Generates the text to be displayed when the user activates the skill
createActiveSkillResultDescription(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Skill
Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, generates the text to be displayed when the skill is used
createEnemyEnvironmentDescription() - Method in class Environment
Generates a brief describing how the environment will affect the enemy during the battle
createPlayerEnvironmentDescription() - Method in class Environment
Generates a brief describing how the environment will affect the player during the battle

D

Dagger - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the Dagger class, this is a subclass of the abstract Weapon class
Dagger(String, int, int) - Constructor for class Dagger
Constructor for the Dagger class
Dagger_Ability - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the Dagger_Ability class, this is a subclass of the abstract Ability class
Dagger_Ability() - Constructor for class Dagger_Ability
Constructor for the Dagger_Ability class
deactivateAbility(Entity) - Method in class Ability
Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, deactivates the weapon's ability
deactivateAbility(Entity) - Method in class BattleAxe_Ability
Concrete implementation of abstract method deactivateAbility
deactivateAbility(Entity) - Method in class Dagger_Ability
Concrete implementation of the abstract method deactivateAbility
deactivateAbility(Entity) - Method in class Fists_Ability
Concrete implementation of abstract method deactivateAbility
deactivateAbility(Entity) - Method in class Greatsword_Ability
Concrete implementation of abstract method deactivateAbility
deactivateAbility(Entity) - Method in class Katana_Ability
Concrete implementation of abstract method deactivateAbility
deactivateAbility(Entity) - Method in class Sword_Ability
Concrete implementation of abstract method deactivateAbility
deactivateSkill(Entity, Entity) - Method in class AdrenalineRush_Skill
Concrete implementation of the deactivateSkill method The condition count is reset upon skill activation, however the defense increase will remain for the amount of turns set within the constructor
deactivateSkill(Entity, Entity) - Method in class DreamSlash_Skill
Concrete implementation of the deactivateSkill method The condition count is reset upon skill activation, however the speed increase will remain for the amount of turns set within the constructor
deactivateSkill(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Omnislash_Skill
Concrete implementation of the deactivateSkill method The condition count is reset upon skill activation
deactivateSkill(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Parry_Skill
Concrete implementation of the deactivateSkill method The condition count is reset upon skill activation, whether any damage was reflected or not
deactivateSkill(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Skill
Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, deactivates the skill Skill deactivation happens either right after a skill is used or it has elapsed its active turn time
defend() - Method in class Entity
Method for setting the entity's defending state to true
displayChoices() - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying possible player actions in a given turn
displayChoices(boolean) - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying possible player actions in a given turn w/ Skill available
displayEndMainMenu() - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying the ending prompt giving the player the option to quit or retry a new battle
displayGameBar(Player, Enemy, Environment) - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying current relevant combat data
displayMainMenu() - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying the Main Menu of the game
displaySelection(String, SelectionController) - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying the relevant selection of objects
displayTurnResult(Player, Enemy, Environment, String, String) - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying the outcome of a turn
displayWinner(String) - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying the result of a given battle

Class file for the abstract Enemy Class, this is a subclass of the abstract Entity class.
Enemy(String, String, int, int, int, int, String) - Constructor for class Enemy
Constructor for the enemy class
Environment - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the Environment class.
Environment(String, boolean) - Constructor for class Environment
Constructor for environments that have no special effect i.e.
Environment(String, boolean, int, String, int, String) - Constructor for class Environment
Constructor for environments that have a special effect, environments only affect 1 stat of the enemy and 1 stat of the player
equipArmor(Armor) - Method in class Entity
Equips the chosen armor object
equipConsumable(Consumable) - Method in class Entity
Equips the chosen consumable object
equipWeapon(Weapon) - Method in class Entity
Equips the chosen weapon object

Class file that controls the events currently running in the program.

G

getAbility() - Method in class Weapon
Getter method for the Ability type
getAbilityDecsription() - Method in class Ability
Getter method to retrieve the weapon's ability description
getAbilityDisplayDescription() - Method in class Ability
Getter method to retrieve the weapon's ability display description
getActiveSkillResultDescription() - Method in class Skill
Getter method to return the skill's result description
getAffectingTurns() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to determine if how many turns the consumable will remain active
getAffectsHolder() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to determine if the consumable affects the player
getAffectsTarget() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to determine if the consumable affects the enemy
getArmor() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to retrieve the Entity's currently equipped armor object
getArmors() - Method in class SelectionController
Getter method to retrieve the armor objects stored.
getAttack() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to retrieve the Entity's current atk value
getAttack() - Method in class Weapon
Getter method for the weapon's atk value
getChargeMultiplier() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to retrieve the entity's current charge multiplier
getChargesLeft() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's current charges
getConditionCounter() - Method in class Skill
Getter method to return the current condition count of the skill
getConsumable() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to retrieve the Entity's currently equipped consumable object
getConsumables() - Method in class SelectionController
Getter method to retrieve the consumable objects stored.
getCounter() - Method in class Enemy
Getter method to retrieve how far the enemy is into their attack pattern
getDefense() - Method in class Armor
Getter method for the armor's def value
getDefense() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to retrieve the Entity's current def value
getDisplay() - Method in class EventController
Getter method to return the CLIViewer
getEnemies() - Method in class SelectionController
Getter method to retrieve the enemy objects stored.
getEnemyConsumableDescription() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's effect on the enemy
getEnemyEffectDescription() - Method in class Environment
Getter method for the description of the enemy effect
getEnemyStatEffect() - Method in class Environment
Getter method to get the value of the enemy's stat effect
getEnemyStatToEffect() - Method in class Environment
Getter method to get the specific enemy stat to be affected
getEnvironments() - Method in class SelectionController
Getter method to retrieve the environment objects stored.
getHasConsumeTemp() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to determine if the Entity has consumed a consumable with temporary effects
getHasEffect() - Method in class Environment
Getter method to determine whether the environment provides a unique effect
getHasMetConditions() - Method in class Ability
Getter method to indicate if the weapon's ability is active or not
getHasMetConditions() - Method in class Skill
Getter method to indicate whether a skill is available to use or not
getHitPoints() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to retrieve the Entity's current HP value
getIsCharging() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to determine if the Entity is currently charging their attack
getIsDefending() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to determine if the Entity is currently defending
getIsInvulnerable() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to determine if the Entity is immune to damage or not
getIsMultipleTurns() - Method in class Skill
 
getIsTemporary() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to determine if the consumable's effects are temporary
getLastAttackDealt() - Method in class Entity
Method for displaying the last attack's value
getLastCharacterAction() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to share the Entity's last action done
getMaxCharges() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's max charges
getName() - Method in class Armor
Getter method for the armor name
getName() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to retrieve the Entity's name
getName() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's unique name
getName() - Method in class Environment
Getter method for the environment's name
getName() - Method in class Weapon
Getter method for the weapon name
getPlayerConsumableDescription() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's effect on the player
getPlayerEffectDescription() - Method in class Environment

getPlayerStatEffect() - Method in class Environment
Getter method to get the value of the player's stat effect
getPlayerStatToEffect() - Method in class Environment
Getter method to get the specific player stat to be affected
getRequiredConditionCounter() - Method in class Skill
Getter method to return the required condition count of the skill

getskillConditionDescription() - Method in class Skill

getStatValuesToAffectTarget() - Method in class Consumable

getTimesToAttack() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to share the Entity's times to attack

getTotalConsumables() - Static method in class Consumable

getTotalEnemies() - Static method in class Enemy

getTotalEnvironments() - Static method in class Environment
Static method to get the total environment objects instantiated
getTotalWeapons() - Static method in class Weapon
Static getter method for total weapon count
getTurnCounter() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve how many turns have elapsed since the consumable was first used
getTurnInputAction() - Method in class Entity
Getter method to share the Entity's input
getTurnsActive() - Method in class Skill
Getter method to return whether a skill's effects are active or not
getTurnsLeft() - Method in class Skill
Getter method to return the remaining amount of turns a skill's effects will remain active

Player - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the player class, the user's controllable fighter in the battle, this is a subclass of the abstract entity class
Player(String) - Constructor for class Player
Constructor for the player class
playerChoice(Scanner) - Method in class EventController
Method for validating user input for their actions in the game, this includes error and exception handling

R

resetCharges() - Method in class Consumable
Method for resetting the charges of the consumable
resetTurnAction() - Method in class Enemy
Resets the position of the enemy's attack pattern
retry(Scanner) - Method in class EventController
Method that allows the user to retry the battle or quit the program

S

selectArmor(Scanner) - Method in class SelectionController
Method for displaying the possible armors the player can equip
selectConsumable(Scanner) - Method in class SelectionController
Method for displaying the possible consumables the player can equip
selectEnemy(Scanner) - Method in class SelectionController
Method for displaying the possible enemies the player can fight
selectEnvironment(Scanner) - Method in class SelectionController
Method for displaying the possible environments to battle in
SelectionController - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file to control selections of weapon, armor, enemy, consumable, and environment objects.
SelectionController(CLIViewer) - Constructor for class SelectionController
Constructor method for the SelectionController
selectWeapon(Scanner) - Method in class SelectionController
Method for displaying the possible weapons the player can equip
setAbility(Ability) - Method in class Weapon
Assign an ability/ passive to the weapon
setActiveSkillResultDescription(String) - Method in class Skill
Setter method to set the text to be displayed when the skill is activated.
setAttack(int) - Method in class Entity
Updates the Entity's atk value
setChargeBase(int) - Method in class Entity
Snapshots the Entity's current atk for charging to isolate it from any atk boosting effects in the turn
setChargeMultipler(int) - Method in class Entity
Sets the charge multiplier for the "charging" action
setConditionCounter(int) - Method in class Skill
Setter method to set the conditionCount of the skill.
setDefense(int) - Method in class Entity
Updates the Entity's def value
setHasConsumeTemp(boolean) - Method in class Entity
Updates the Entity's current temporary consumable usage
setHasMetConditions(boolean) - Method in class Ability
Setter method to indicate the state of the weapon's ability
setHasMetConditions(boolean) - Method in class Skill
Setter method to indicate the state of the weapon's skill activation.
setHitPoints(int) - Method in class Entity
Updates the Entity's health value
setIsInvulnerable(boolean) - Method in class Entity
Updates the state to determine if the Entity is immune to damage or not
setIsMultipleTurns(boolean) - Method in class Skill
Setter method to set whether the skill lasts for multiple turns or not.
setLastCharacterAction(String) - Method in class Entity
Updates and stores a String equivalent of what the Entity's last action was
setRequiredConditionCounter(int) - Method in class Skill
Setter method to set the RequiredConditionCount of the skill.
setSpeed(int) - Method in class Entity
Updates the Entity's spd value
setTimesToAttack(int) - Method in class Entity
Updates and stores how many times the Entity will perform the Attack action
setTurnInputAction(char) - Method in class Entity
Updates and stores a char equivalent of what the Entity will do this turn
setTurnsActive(boolean) - Method in class Skill
Setter method to indicate if the skill is active or not This is assumed false and must be changed to otherwise in the activateSkill method.
setTurnsLeft(int) - Method in class Skill
Setter method to set the amount of turns left where a skill's effects remain active
Skill - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the abstract Skill class
Skill(String, String) - Constructor for class Skill
Constructor for the Skill class
start(Scanner) - Method in class EventController
Method to run the initial starting menu of the program
stopCharging() - Method in class Entity
Method for setting the Entity's charging state to false
stopDefending() - Method in class Entity
Method for setting the Entity's defending state to false

Class file for the Sword class, this is a subclass of the abstract Weapon class
Sword(String, int, int) - Constructor for class Sword

Class file for Sword_Ability, this is a subclass of the abstract Ability class
Sword_Ability() - Constructor for class Sword_Ability

T

Thief - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the Thief class, this is a subclass of the abstract Enemy class
Thief(String, String, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class Thief
Constructor for the thief class
think(Entity) - Method in class Entity
Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses Dictates what the entity object will do in a given turn
think(Entity) - Method in class Minotaur
Concrete implementation of the think method Method that dictates the action of the minotaur in a given turn
think(Entity) - Method in class Player
Method for the player to choose what they wish to do during their turn, the player can choose to do only one action per turn
think(Entity) - Method in class Thief
Concrete implementation of the think method Method that dictates the action of the thief in a given turn
think(Entity) - Method in class Unique_Enemy
Concrete implementation of the think method Dictates what the enemy will do in a given turn
think(Entity) - Method in class Viking
Concrete implementation of the think method Method that dictates the action of the viking in a given turn
totalEnemies - Static variable in class Enemy
 
totalWeapons - Static variable in class Weapon
 
turnSystem() - Method in class EventController
Method to control actual running battle
type - Variable in class Weapon
 

U

unequipArmor() - Method in class Entity
Unequips the currently equipped armor
unequipConsumable() - Method in class Entity
Unequips the currently equipped consumable
unequipWeapon() - Method in class Entity
Unequips the currently equipped weapon
Unique_Enemy - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the Unique Enemy class, this is a subclass of the abstract Enemy class
Unique_Enemy(String, String, int, int, int, int, String, Weapon, Consumable) - Constructor for class Unique_Enemy
Constructor for the unique enemy class
updateTurnAction() - Method in class Enemy
Method to iterate through the enemy's attack pattern dictating its action in the turn
useCharges() - Method in class Consumable
Method that decrements the current amount of charges of the consumable
useConsumable(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Bomb
Concrete implementation of the useConsumable method Every time a consumable is used, its remaining charges are decremented If a consumable with no remaining charges is used, nothing happens
useConsumable(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Buff
Concrete implementation of the useConsumable method Every time a consumable is used, its remaining charges are decremented If a consumable with no remaining charges is used, nothing happens
useConsumable(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Consumable
Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses
useConsumable(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Healing
Concrete implementation of the useConsumable method Every time a consumable is used, its remaining charges are decremented If a consumable with no remaining charges is used, nothing happens
usePassiveAbility(Entity, Entity) - Method in class Weapon
Method to activate the current weapon's equipped ability/ passive
useSkill(Entity) - Method in class Entity
Method for using the skill of the entity's equipped weapon if it's available

V

Viking - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the Viking class, this is a subclass of the abstract Enemy class
Viking(String, String, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class Viking
Constructor for the viking class

W
